name: Mexican Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, cook the minced garlic in olive oil over moderate heat for 1 minute.
2. Add the crushed hot red pepper and ground cumin to the pan. Stir until combined.
3. Mix in the dry-roasted peanuts and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes.
4. Sprinkle the coarse salt and chili powder evenly over the mixture.
5. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely before storing it in a covered jar or tin. The nuts will improve in flavor if left to stand for some time.
